## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential strategy sprint engagement between growthx.ai and Galileo](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Conor (Galileo) is interested in a strategy sprint to enhance their eval/reliability story, with potential product launches aligning to this](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Kyle (growthx.ai) offered a discounted 2-month strategy sprint for $20K, aiming for a July start if possible](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Conor will pitch this as part of a larger 6-12 month plan to Galileo leadership within 48-72 hours](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Potential for early renewal incentives and add-ons to be explored post-sprint](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

## Topics

### Current Challenges at Galileo

  - [Recent feature launch had issues, forcing a rollback and disrupting planned product launch](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Conor juggling multiple roles, including subbing for product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Upcoming vacation (Jul 15-29) complicating launch timelines](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

### Strategy Sprint Details

  - [Typically 6-8 weeks, flexible based on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Usual cost starts at $30K, offered at $20K as incentive](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Includes AI-ready artifacts, roadmap building, and execution (e.g., high-volume refreshes)](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Can start as early as July 31st or August 1st](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Will be structured as a standalone SOW, with potential to amend existing agreement later](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Galileo's Upcoming Plans

  - [Conor flying to San Francisco for 8-hour marketing onsite work](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Pitching new programs and budget for next few months](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Potentially expanding role to focus more on growth and demand-side responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Looking to pass off product marketing duties in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)

### Partnership Expansion Opportunities

  - [Explore Galileo becoming more central to eval/reliability story in AI](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Potential for both open-source and proprietary product launches](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Discussing early renewal incentives and add-ons post-strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to send SOW and supporting notes to Conor by late afternoon](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Conor to review materials after 3 PM and aim to finalize decision within 48-72 hours](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [If approved, potentially sign agreement before Conor's vacation (by Friday)](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Explore early renewal incentives and add-ons after strategy sprint completion](https://fathom.video/share/gG1-iLpK4dkzWKYo4yNLisbtVNcrKNUQ?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
